title: DeshProperty
shortSummary: Real Estate Management Platform helping users buy, sell, rent and manage properties with secure authentication, dashboards and analytics.
challenge: Managing real estate properties, listings, and inquiries manually leads to inefficiencies, slow response times, and lack of transparency.
solution: A scalable web platform that digitizes property management, enabling seamless listings, secure user authentication, and comprehensive analytics dashboards.
impact: Streamlines real estate operations and improves user experience for buyers and sellers.
features: Property Listings, Advanced Search & Filtering, User Authentication, Analytics Dashboard, Inquiry Management

title: FoodChain
shortSummary: Supply Chain Tracking platform for Restaurants, NGOs and Food Donation Management.
challenge: Lack of transparency in the food supply chain and inefficient tracking for food donations.
solution: An end-to-end web platform that connects restaurants with NGOs, tracking food supply and managing donations securely.
impact: Reduces food waste and ensures safe, tracked food distribution to those in need.
features: Donation Tracking, NGO Portal, Restaurant Dashboard, Analytics, Supply Chain Transparency

title: Smart LPG
shortSummary: IoT based LPG Gas Leakage Detection and Cylinder Level Monitoring System.
challenge: Gas leaks pose severe safety risks, and unexpected cylinder depletion causes inconvenience.
solution: An embedded IoT system that constantly monitors gas levels and detects leaks in real-time.
impact: Prevents accidents through early warning and ensures continuous gas supply monitoring.
features: Real-time Leak Detection, Gas Level Monitoring, Audio Alerts, Mobile Notifications, LCD Display

title: Smart Gloves
shortSummary: Gesture Translation Smart Gloves converting hand movements into speech.
challenge: Communication barriers exist for people with speech and hearing impairments.
solution: A wearable smart glove equipped with flex sensors that translates hand gestures into spoken language via a mobile app.
impact: Empowers differently-abled individuals to communicate easily with the general public.
features: Gesture Recognition, Real-time Audio Translation, Bluetooth Connectivity, Wearable Design

title: Smart Guest Introduction
shortSummary: AI Receptionist Robot capable of welcoming visitors and introducing guests automatically.
challenge: Automating the reception and greeting process in corporate environments.
solution: An AI-powered robotic system that uses computer vision to recognize and greet guests, providing an automated receptionist experience.
impact: Modernizes corporate reception areas and reduces the need for manual front-desk staffing.
features: Facial Recognition, Automated Greeting, Visitor Logging, Interactive Audio Responses

title: Smart Glasses (Face Recognition)
shortSummary: Smart glasses for visually impaired people using Face Recognition with audio feedback.
challenge: Visually impaired individuals struggle with identifying people in their surroundings.
solution: Wearable smart glasses that detect faces and provide auditory feedback using bone conduction technology.
technologies: Arduino Nano, Ultrasonic Sensor, Bone Conduction Audio
impact: Increases independence and situational awareness for the visually impaired.
features: Face Detection, Obstacle Detection, Bone Conduction Audio, Lightweight Design

title: Fire Fighting Robot
shortSummary: Autonomous robot capable of detecting fire and extinguishing flames.
challenge: Navigating hazardous environments to extinguish fires puts human lives at risk.
solution: An autonomous robot equipped with flame sensors and a motorized water pump to detect and extinguish fires independently.
impact: Reduces human risk in hazardous fire situations and enables rapid automated response.
features: Autonomous Navigation, Flame Detection, Automated Water Pumping, Obstacle Avoidance

title: Obstacle Avoiding Robot
shortSummary: Autonomous navigation robot capable of obstacle detection and avoidance.
challenge: Creating a reliable autonomous navigation system for unknown environments.
solution: A wheeled robotic platform that uses ultrasonic sensors to detect obstacles and dynamically adjust its path.
impact: Provides a foundational platform for autonomous delivery and exploration robots.
features: Ultrasonic Obstacle Detection, Real-time Path Correction, Wireless Control via ESP8266

title: Smart Glasses (Haptic)
shortSummary: Smart Glasses providing haptic feedback navigation for visually impaired users.
challenge: Safe navigation in complex environments without relying solely on auditory cues.
solution: A haptic-feedback navigation wearable that uses ultrasonic sensors to detect obstacles and guides the user via directional vibrations.
impact: Offers an intuitive, non-intrusive navigation aid for visually impaired individuals.
features: Ultrasonic Proximity Sensing, Directional Haptic Feedback, Wireless Connectivity, Low Latency
